AEMP3A7IKW37CMWFXNKXWW6HGJHA_1.product_description: Vice Reversa Pigment Fader - Dark Spot Remover for Face, with Niacinamide, Gluthathione and Vitamin C, MicroCrystal Skincare (12 Patches)
AEMP3A7IKW37CMWFXNKXWW6HGJHA_1.review_text:
First, I have to say These do NOT technically pierce the skin, though some brands will say they do. I saw some reviews mentioning how they puncture the skin, which will stimulate collagen and help further absorption. That does NOT happen with microneedle patches. It occurs with microneedling (or dermarolling/stamps) when you actually pierce into the skin with a micro needle pen/dermaroller/derma stamp. And, even then, Collagen is only stimulated when the needle is long enough (0.5mm length needles are needed to even get a mild effect of stimulating collagen). With these microneedle patches, the skin benefiting ingredients have been crystallized to form little sharp crystals that are no bigger than 250 microns, which is about a third of the width of a human hair. So, pretty small (250 microns equals 0.25 mm). They simply dissolve into the skin. The main difference between microneedling (dermarolling) and microneedle patches is they don’t actually prick the skin and cause injury. They don’t cause trauma to the skin. Instead, the crystals simply dissolve into the skin. (And this info is from the brand’s website). So, these patches have crystals made up of active ingredients that gently press into the skin and then are the water in the skin activates them to dissolve.

Someone else also said these have retinol in them, which isn’t the case. I put the full ingredient list at the end of my review.

I love microneedle and hydrocolloid patches. I have some post acne marks. I don’t know what it is but pimples and post acne marks just never want to go away on me! I get hormonal breakouts. So, right around that time I get a pimple or 2. I start treating them as soon as I notice them appearing. But, they still usually end up getting bad and taking a week or 2 to go away! By time I get the darn things to go away, it’s time for more! It’s a very frustrating process. From my time before using pimple patches, I have some scars. And, after the pimples finally do resolve, I sometimes end up with a red mark there. So, I saw these and was really intrigued to give them a try! I figured they had a good shot of working because my scars aren’t large or big scars. They’re just little marks, some slightly indented. Most are just dark red, flat marks. But, they’re a pain to cover with makeup! Makeup never wants to stay on them well! I have a skin care regimen I use and some products are specifically for dark spots/post acne marks, but I figured these patches would be more targeted!

I also have sun spots on my temples and cheekbones. Though, they aren’t specific spots, more like a line of spots, so I wasn’t sure these patches would be the best option for those.

These have 500 “serum-infused MicroCrystals” that “deliver a concentrated formula of tranexamic acid, niacinamide, vitamin C, and glutathione.” These were “developed using a mixture of regenerative ingredients renowned for their skin-rejuvenating properties. Restore skin texture, brighten skin and reduce the appearance of dark spots in a matter of weeks.”

If you’re interested in some info on the ingredients, I included some at the end of my review (full list of ingredients marked with 🟢 and info on specific ingredients marked with 🔴)

The patches are nice. They’re decent sizes. Depending on the size of the spot you’re trying to treat, they might be too big, might not be big enough, or might be just right. They MIGHT be able to be cut down if you needed a smaller size. But, I personally wouldn’t want to cut them - I don’t know how they would effect the microcrystals, plus I don’t want to risk contaminating them. It would be nice if they included some smaller ones, or even better would be an option to buy a pack of this size or a pack of smaller ones, depending on the size of the areas you want to treat.

I found these to stick really well IF you’re applying them to clean, dry skin. If the skin is even a TINY bit damp (you applied moisturizer and some got in the area or you accidentally touched the area with your finger before applying the patch), then it might not stick well and end up falling off easily. But, if you make sure the skin is clean and completely dry before applying the patch, they stick GREAT! Stick them on, press the center for a few seconds, and you feel a little kind of poke, but nothing that hurts. After the initial poke, you don’t feel them. I forget I even have the patch on!

Directions say to leave on for AT LEAST 2 hours, but IDEALLY overnight to give the micro crystals time to fully dissolve and release the actives into the skin. Use 2-3 times a week. It says to expect results from 2 weeks for blemishes and 6-8 weeks for dark spots. Continue use until desired result is an achieved. To avoid risk of sensitivity, do not use more than 3 times per week or within 24 hours of previous application

Here’s the problem. You need to use these consistently for a little while (how long would depend on how dark the mark is and your skin) to see results. There’s only 12 patches in a pack! You use 2-3 patches a week for ONE spot, which means a pack will last 4-6 weeks. If you’re trying to fade a blemish, since it says you could expect results in 2 weeks then you have a good chance of seeing results. BUT if you’re trying to fade a dark spot, it says that takes 6-8 weeks so you MIGHT start seeing results by time you finish the pack, but you might not. If the dark spot is extremely dark, it’s going to take even longer I’m sure. They really should offer a larger size pack so you can purchase 1 pack to have enough to heal at least 1 spot. Not to mention the fact, we’re only talking about 1 spot! If you have multiple spots, then you’re really going to run out of patches quickly! If using this for blemishes, you could get a few patches for a few blemishes. But for dark spots, the pack of 12 is most likely going to go all to treating one single dark spot, and even then you might not actually see results. At a price of $34.95 for a pack of 12 (at the time of writing this review), that’s $2.91 per patch, which is pretty darn pricey!

On top of the fact you need to use multiple patches to fade 1 spot, the fact is when using lightening ingredients like niacinamide, tranexamic acid, Kojic acid, etc., these ingredients lighten the skin by suppressing the production of pigment  in the skin cells and will unfortunately only help as long as you are using them. So, you would need to use the ingredients continuously.

I did notice a slight difference using a few patches on a post acne mark. I also wanted to test out these patches on a dark spot and didn’t notice any different with that but after using a few on a post acne mark, I didn’t have enough to use them 2-3 times a week on the spot for the full 6-8 weeks they say it takes to get results so I wasn’t surprised.

Unfortunately, given the fact that you’re only getting 12 patches for $34.95 and you need multiple patches for 1 spot AND need to continue using it to keep the spot away once you get rid of it, I don’t think these patches are worth it. I feel you’re better off getting a bottle of serum or cream with these ingredients in it (preferably one that uses them as ACTIVE ingredients and states the specific percentages of each ingredient so you know it’s enough to actually be effective). I think it would be a more effective way to fade dark spots and keep them away AND give you more bang for your buck. So, I don’t really recommend these. They COULD be effective if you had enough of them and were willing to fork over the $34.95 each time to continue buying them. Whether that’s worth it to you is for you to decide. For me, I think I’ll stick to serums.

As a side note, I did try out some other dark spot microneedle patches-[[ASIN:B09C15YNVL Rael Microcrystal Dark Spot Patch]]and for those you got 6 patches for $11.99 (so for 12 it would be $23.98, which is cheaper than the $34.95 these cost). Those also use microcrystals to dissolve and release skin brightening ingredients below the surface, which include niacinamide, tranexamic acid, and broccoli extract. (I included the full ingredient list of the Rael Patches at the very end, marked with 🟣)

🟢FULL INGREDIENTS
Sodium Hyaluronate, Glycerin, Trehalose, Ascorbyl Glucoside, Tranexamic Acid, Niacinamide, Glutathione, Madecassoside, Polyglyceryl-10-Laurate, Linolenic acid

🔴SPECIFIC INFO ON THE INGREDIENTS:
Sodium Hyaluronate - Form of hyaluronic acid. Helps skin hold onto water, making skin more plump and elastic.

Glycerin - Great moisturizer for the skin, helps protect skin against irritation and restore skin barrier.

Trehalose - Moisturizer/humectant with water-binding properties and helps keep skin hydrated. 

Ascorbyl Glucoside - This is a Vitamin C derivative. It’s one of the best options when it comes to vitamin C derivatives. It’s really stable and easy to formulate. It’s been shown to penetrate the skin, which is important for an anti-aging ingredient to do it’s job. After it’s absorbed into skin, it’s converted into pure vitamin C and shows all 3 anti-aging benefits (antioxidant protection, collagen boosting, and fading hyperpigmentation) that pure vitamin C does.

Tranexamic Acid (TXA) - Shown to be as effective as hydroquinone but without the side effects! When applied topically, it can help treat a range of dermatologic issues, including lightening discolorations from PIH (dark marks on the skin after a pimple heals). It might also help ease up freckling and sunspots. Brightening ingredients work in different ways, so it’s best to combine brightening ingredients to come at the issue from every angle. TXA works by inhibiting plasmin activity. So, it can be combined with ingredients that inhibit the enzyme tyrosinase like vitamin C and glutathione, both of which are in these patches. You also want to look for ingredients that inhibit transfer of pigment to cells, like niacinamide, which is also included in these patches! So with these multiple ingredients targeting dark spots from different pathways, you’re approaching the issue from every angle!

Niacinamide - This is a powerful active ingredient that can moisturize, support the skin barrier, soothe, and help treat pigmentation, acne, and wrinkles without causing irritation. In other words, it can do the same heavy lifting that other actives do without the redness or dryness they might cause. In fact, it makes skin calmer as it gets firmer and smoother. It’s a precursor to molecules that allow all cells, including skin cells, to repair damage and neutralize free radicals that can cause skin cancer and the breakdown of collagen and elastin. For dryness, it increases the production of ceramides, which protect your skin barrier and seal in moisture. For dark spots, it inhibits the transfer of pigment to cells, improving discoloration. For irritation, it’s both an antioxidant and anti-inflammatory. So it neutralizes and calms the skin’s inflammatory responses to things like UV radiation and cell turnover. And it’s a gentler and more stable antioxidant than vitamin C, another hardworking ingredient, making it ideal for sensitive skin. It’s also good for acne prone skin. Along with the anti-inflammatory effects, it's also been shown to decrease oil production and normalize the lining of the pores, keeping them from getting clogged and enlarged.

Glutathione - Powerful antioxidant that naturally occurs in the skin where it helps defend it against the visible effects of environmental damage. The gradual decline of the natural supply of glutathione in the body is believed to be a key marker of many outward signs of aging. Glutathione is a tripeptide made up of 3 amino acids that work together to brighten a dull complexion while offering skin-restoring benefits. It has value for visibly fading discolorations when used in a 2% concentration due to its ability to interrupt an enzyme within skin’s surface that triggers hyperpigmentation.

Madecassoside - Antioxidant, soothing activities because it’s one of the main of the main biologically active components of Centella Asiatica.

Linolenic Acid - An omega-3 fatty acid. It can help protect skin from UV damage. It provides photoprotection by converting into compounds that fight inflammation and boost the skin’s response to aggressors. It also protects the skin from UV-induced hyperpigmentation, helping improve uneven skin tone. It also helps promote cell turnover and keep skin soft and smooth, strengthen skin barrier, and provide moisture.

🟣Rael Patches Ingredients
Sodium Hyaluronate, Glycerin, Trehalose, Ascorbyl Glucoside, Tranexamic Acid, Niacinamide, Glutathione, Madecassoside, Hippophae Rhamnoides Fruit Extract, Polyglyceryl-10-Laurate, 1,2-Hexanediol, Butylene Glycol, Linolenic acid, Brassica Oleracea Italica (Broccoli) Extract

They have the same ingredients, except the Rael Patches have 4 extras (these Vice Reversa Patches have 10 total ingredients, and the Rael Patches have 14 total ingredients). The first 8 ingredients are the same for both. Then the Rael Patches have Hippophae Rhamnoides Fruit Extract added in as the 9th ingredient, so it’s where the order of the ingredients start to differ but you’ll notice the all the same ingredients from these Vice Reversa Patches aside from the 4 extras in the Rael Patches. The 4 extras are Hippophae Rhamnoides Fruit Extract (an antioxidant, anti-aging, soothing ingredient that’s a good source of vitamin C, various B vitamins, vitamin E, and numerous compounds that give antioxidant benefits), 1,2-Hexanediol (multi-functional ingredient that gives soft and nice feel to formula, acts as humectant and emollient, can be solvent for other ingredients), Butylene Glycol (main job is as solvent for other ingredients but also helps product absorb faster and deeper into skin (penetration enhanced), make product spread nicely over skin (slip agent), and attract water into skin (humectant), and Brassica Oleracea Italica (Broccoli) Extract (has powerful antioxidants to help protect skin, high in fatty acid content so extremely moisturizing, and called nature’s retinol because it contains vitamin A to deliver benefits of cell turnover without unwanted side effects if prescription retinoids). So, the additional 4 ingredients aren’t too bad! At the cheaper price with the same ingredients (aside from 4 extras), it might be worth trying those instead.

AEMP3A7IKW37CMWFXNKXWW6HGJHA_1.product_description: KIMUSE 2Color Dual Cream Contour Stick, Multi Blush & Contour Bronzer Stick, Long Lasting & Waterproof Contour Sticks Kit for Light Skin Face Makeup
AEMP3A7IKW37CMWFXNKXWW6HGJHA_1.review_text:
This comes in an outer product box. It’s made in China. The tube this comes in is nice. It has a matte look to it.

The contour stick was what really interested me in this set. So many cream contour sticks labeled as “contour” end up being really warm toned. Contour is supposed to mimic your natural shadows, so it’s supposed to be cool toned, even grey toned. But, it’s hard to find one that’s actually cool toned, and even harder finding one that’s grey toned. This one looked like it was neutral, leaning cool with a kind of rosy undertone. So, I wanted to give it a try. The few rosy/pink toned contour/bronzer sticks I’ve found have worked well for me as bronzers because I have neutral leaning slightly cool skin.

On me, thus leans more warm toned than I’d like. But, once blended out, it isn’t as orange as others. Of course, it could be different for you, depending on your undertone. While it doesn’t work as a contour for me like it wanted, it does make a nice bronzer for me. The formula of it is nice. It’s soft, smooth, creamy. It blends easily. I never swipe sticks like these onto my face. I always take my sponge or brush, dab it onto the stick, and then blend it onto my skin. I find that works better and I don’t need to worry about whether swiping it directly on will lift my foundation underneath. This is pigmented, but it blends out so easily that it’s easy to blend it away. I find if I pick up and apply a little, it blends out easily and looks natural on my skin but I just need to be careful not to blend it away! But, I can also build it up for a more intense color. I like that. Once blended out, it is matte and dries down to a powder like finish that I don’t need to set and it lasts all day without any issues.

The highlighter is okay. It’s too glittery for my liking. I like more of a pearl look without glitter. But if you don’t mind micro glitter, you might like this. Its really subtle aside from the glitter so I just think there’s better options.

Overall, I think it’s worth it for the contour/bronzer side. It works really well and is easy to work with (when dabbing your brush/sponge onto the stick and then applying it) and it sets down on its own with a matte powder like finish without needing to be set. I wouldn’t recommend the highlighter. It’s just really sheer other than glitter so I think there’s better options. But, if you like a sheer but glittery highlighter, then this could work for you. I give it 4 stars because I really like the bronzer, I just don’t like the highlighter.

AEMP3A7IKW37CMWFXNKXWW6HGJHA_1.product_description: LOKNGXU Eyebrow Pencil to Modify Eyebrows Easy to Color Waterproof Long-Lasting Non-Dizzy Makeup with Spiral Eyebrow Brush (3# Dark Grey)
AEMP3A7IKW37CMWFXNKXWW6HGJHA_1.review_text:
LOKNGXU Eyebrow Pencil

🟧OUTER PACKAGING
This comes in an outer product box that is inside a sealed plastic bag. Ingredients are listed on the box. It is made in China.

🟧CRUELTY FREE STATUS
This has a cruelty free logo (PETA). But, I don’t think they’re actually cruelty free. The brand name on the box says AMIIR. I did a search for the brand name, manufacturer name, and cosmetic production license name and nothing showed up on PETAs website where you can do a search. So, if you’re cruelty free, you might want to look into it some more.

🟧DUAL ENDED
This is dual ended - one end the pencil, the other end a standard spoolie brush. The box was a little smashed when it arrived. Unfortunately, the part with the spoolie had kind of bent and came out. Fortunately, I was able to pop it back in (as you can see in the photos, but can also see the line where it bent some). Once popped back in though, the spoolie worked fine so I was happy about that! The spoolie is nice. It’s not too rough. It works well.

🟧MY BROWS - THICKNESS, COLOR
I don’t have unruly or thick brows, but they also aren’t really thin. They’re a little sparse in areas, but for the most part not bad. I just like to lightly fill in the sparse areas.

I have a hard time getting the shade for me. I have medium to dark brown hair. My brows are like a muted black color. Whenever I get brown brow pencils, even the dark brown ones, they tend to be way too warm and don’t look right in my brows. I’ve found the best luck with charcoal, gray, dark gray, and black shades. Though, some of those are too pigmented and can be way too dark in my brows.

🟧SHADE OF PENCIL - 3# Dark Grey
With this pencil, I was excited when I saw a “Grey Brown” shade. I’ve tried others that were similar in name and the shade worked well for me. But, with this one, in the product photos the hair they showed with it looked more like ash blonde and said “suitable for maroon or coffee color,” which definitely wouldn’t work for me - coffee color maybe, but maroon no way! But, the actual brows in the photo looked like the color would work well. But, then I looked at the photo they had all the shades on the arm to show it was waterproof, and in that the shade “Grey Brown” definitely looked more like a light brown or ash blonde kind of brow shade. They also had a “Dark Grey,” which looked like a charcoal black kind of color - not full on black, but not gray. I was a little worried it might be too dark, but figured I’d have a better chance with “Dark Grey” than with the “Grey Brown” shade given they used the word “maroon” when describing who it would work for.

Fortunately, the color “Dark Grey” does work really well for me. It can be too dark so I have to use a light hand, but I find a light hand is easy with this formula.

🟧SHAPE OF PENCIL
I tend to like precise, small tipped brow pencils. My usual go to ones are the Nyx Micro Brow or Elf Ultra Precise Brow Pencil. They’re affordable and have a really small tip so I can get good hair like strokes and they work nicely.

This is a unique shape. Triangle shapes are usually too thick for me to get precise, thin hairlike strokes. Not with this shape! This is more of a diamond shape. There is an extremely thin line where you can easily get thin hairlike strokes. You can also use the really pointed tip to get thin hairlike strokes.

**NOTE: I will say I’m a little worried how the shape will hold up. I’ve been using this every day since I got it and notice the shape is wearing down…like the defined and pointed areas I love so much. It makes sense that those would wear down, just like any pencil does and will eventually need sharpened. But, it’s not like you can really sharpen this back into that original shape. So, unless you’re careful and try to use it evenly on both sides and tips to kind of make sure it wears the same and kind of maintains the shape….and who has the time and patience for that?!…it’s going to eventually end up being like a chubby angled liner shape. So, we’ll see how much I like it at that point? With the price and how much I like it, depending how long the shape lasts for it might be worth it to me to just purchase a new one at that time. So, I will just have to see how long the shape lasts and go from there.

🟧FORMULA OF PENCIL (HOW IT APPLIES, WEARS)
The formula is really nice! It glides onto my brows easily. It’s really creamy. It doesn’t skip at all, doesn’t tug at all. It doesn’t feel or look waxy. It is pigmented, so like I said, it can be too dark for me. But, it glides on so easily, it’s easy to use a very light hand. It blends in with my brow hairs nicely. When using a very light hand and the thin line, I get perfect hairlike strokes and don’t even need to use the spoolie to blend them in because they look perfect and natural! Though, if you want more of a faded look, the spoolie can do that too! You can also press harder for it to be darker since it is pigmented. It lasts well throughout the day. Usually with really creamy formulas, they just wipe off when I blend my brows with a spoolie and if they don’t, they wear off quick. So, I usually like ones that are in the middle of waxy and creamy - waxy enough to last, but creamy enough to glide on easily. With this one being so creamy, I expected it wouldn’t last well - it would just go away if I used a spoolie in my brows or it would wear off quick - but it actually lasts all day long even through a hot day outside or a day at work running around and sweating!

🟧OVERALL THOUGHTS
If you’re looking for a great brow pen, I’d definitely recommend trying this one out! It has a unique shape that works well, it has a great formula that is really easy to work with, and it lasts well all day!

AEMP3A7IKW37CMWFXNKXWW6HGJHA_1.product_description: JUNG SAEM MOOL OFFICIAL] JUNGSAEMMOOL Minifying Cica Mist Balm
AEMP3A7IKW37CMWFXNKXWW6HGJHA_1.review_text:
This comes in a nice outer product box. Made in Korea. The brand’s website said it’s 100% vegan, excluding animal ingredients and animal experiments. It also doesn’t include parabens.

It comes in a nice compact. It’s a compact like a cushion foundation where you open it and there’s a kind of lid that holds the sponge applicator, and you lift that lid to reveal the product. You press the applicator sponge into it (or your own sponge or brush) and then apply it. The brand’s website said the included sponge applicator is an “eco puff” made of “eco-friendly corns” and is “99.9% anti-bacterial and water-repellent,” which makes it safe on skin and keeps puff clean.

This is a liquidy but balm kind of texture. It isn’t as thick as a balm. It just feels like a cushion foundation. But this isn’t a foundation. It has a very light, mint green color to it. It’s so light that it’s almost white but has the green color to it. When applied, it reduces redness. It doesn’t do as well as my more pigmented green correctors, but it does a nice job while being hydrating and lightweight on the skin. It’s something that works well before applying foundation. It is lightweight enough to wear well under foundation. It isn’t a primer really, it doesn’t smooth out the skin or fill in pores. But, it does reduce the redness in my skin so then I use less foundation and concealer. If you have a TON of redness or it’s REALLY red, this might not be enough since it isn’t extremely pigmented. But, it will make a difference. I like it isn’t drying on the skin either.

I’m just not sure how I feel about it though. It works well on the skin. But, I do like to know what’s in my products. I don’t like that they provided barely any product info, and the ingredients on the product box weren’t in English. They also didn’t include them here on the product page. Not even the product photos provided any real info on the product - what it does, who it’s for, how to use it, ingredients, etc. I had to go to the brand’s website to find out more. Yes, it’s a simple Google search, but it’s not really something you should have to do.

Normally, I would just go to the brand’s website to find the list of ingredients when they’re not included on the Amazon product page. But, the Jung Saem Mool website didn’t have them on their website either. I looked for them elsewhere and did find an ingredient list on Korean Beauty Box, but didn’t think they were accurate because they didn’t include centella asiatica, pine sprout, or green calamine powder, which are supposed to be in this product. So, I translated the ingredients from the box myself. But, I’m not that confident in the ingredients provided on the box.(I included a photo from the box, and also included the ingredients at the end of my review in English)

It doesn’t seem like a complete list of ingredients to me. It has the first ingredient as titanium dioxide. It has tocopherol (vitamin E) as the 3rd ingredient. The rest of the ingredient are 7, kind of versions I’d guess you’d call them, of centella asiatica. There’s nothing else listed. It’s kind of odd. The brand’s website said this is supposed to have “2 plants - pine sprout containing fresh moisture and centella asiatica roots.” I saw the “centella asiatica roots” in the ingredients when I translated them. But didn’t see any “pine sprout.” I also saw something about “cica pine water” on the brand’s website, but again, not sure what that’s supposed to be? The brand’s website also mentioned “Natural green calamine powder covers reddened skin tone.” Again, I didn’t see any calamine powder at all in the ingredients.

The 7, I guess versions, of Centella Asiatica are:
Centella Asiatica Extract (5,159,235ppm) - Well known soothing, antioxidant, and moisturizing ingredient. Anti-inflammatory. The main biologically active components are Asiaticoside, madecassoside, asiatic acid, and madecassic acid. All of which are in this.

Centella Asiatica Leaf Extract (0.035ppm)

Centella Asiatica Root Extract (0.03ppm)

Madecassoside (0.0025ppm) - One of the main biologically active components of Centella Asiatica.

Madecassic Acid (0.0025ppm) - One of the main biologically active components of Centella Asiatica.

Asiaticoside (0.0025ppm) - One of the main biologically active components of Centella Asiatica.

Asiatic Acid (0.0025ppm) - One of the main biologically active components of Centella Asiatica. It’s less prominent than it’s sister component, Asiaticoside, but it still contributes to the well-established moisturizing and wound healing abilities of Centella Asiatica.

Overall, it works well. It reduces my redness, feels hydrating on the skin, and works well on its own and under foundation. It feels lightweight on the skin. If they provided the full ingredient list, it would be something I’d be willing to purchase. But, right now, I don’t like they didn’t include them and don’t like that they can’t even be found online as far as I could tell. And I just have a hard time believing the ingredient list I translated from the box is the full ingredient list. I don’t know. If the ingredients aren’t a big factor for you, this is nice and works well. If knowing the ingredients are important to you, I’d look elsewhere. There’s other similar products that actually provide a full ingredient list, and a lot of them are far cheaper. I give it 3 stars.

How to Use (from brand’s website):
Use as last step of skin care routine. Dip puff into content and gently apply and dab on skin.

Special Tips (from brand’s website)
Carry it in makeup bag or purse for easy supply of moisture to skin when it dries up.
Use as lightweight skin tone corrector to correct sensitive skin tone covered by masks instead of applying heavy, caking makeup.

FULL INGREDIENTS
Ingredients | Titanium dioxide (CI 77891], Centella Asiatica Extract (5,159,235ppm), Tocopherol, Centella Asiatica Leaf Extract (0.035ppm), Centella Asiatica Root Extract (0.03ppm), Madecassoside (0.0025ppm), Madecassic Acid (0.0025ppm), Asiaticoside (0.0025ppm), Asiatic Acid (0.0025ppm)

**NOTE: Just for reference, 1ppm = 0.0001% (or 10,000 ppm = 1%). So…

Centella Asiatica Extract (5,159,235ppm) = 515.9235%
*5,159,235ppm is parts per million, so it means there’s 5,159,235 parts of Centella Asiatica in one million molecules
Centella Asiatica Leaf Extract (0.035ppm) = 0.0000035%
Centella Asiatica Root Extract (0.03ppm) = 0.000003%
Madecassoside (0.0025ppm) = 0.00000025%
Madecassic Acid (0.0025ppm) = 0.00000025%
Asiaticoside (0.0025ppm) = 0.00000025%
Asiatic Acid (0.0025ppm) = 0.00000025%

AEMP3A7IKW37CMWFXNKXWW6HGJHA_1.product_description: Eye Corrector Serum With Triple Peptides 1 oz. (28g) by BeautyLux
AEMP3A7IKW37CMWFXNKXWW6HGJHA_1.review_text:
This comes with no outer product box, just the bottle. But, the bottle is sealed with plastic wrapping around it. It is made in the US. The ingredients are listed on the label.

This is supposed to be cruelty free, gluten free, silicone free, sulfate free, paraben free, talc free, 100% vegan, and have clean ingredients. It didn’t have any labels on it saying it was cruelty free, but the brand’s website said they’re cruelty free. It also said they use natural and organic ingredients. But, they are not certified organic. It states, “Our products are made with natural and organic ingredients, however, they are not certified organic. All of our products are made in the U.S. using top-quality domesticated and imported ingredients.” I’m not surprised they said they’re not certified organic. I love their honesty. I’ve seen lots of skincare brands claim their products are 100% organic when they definitely aren’t. Most skin care products are water-based and water can NOT be certified as organic, so the possibility of finding a 100% organic skincare product is close to impossible.

This claims to be hydrating, brightening, and soothing. It claims to target fine lines around the eyes, reduce appearance of dark circles and puffiness, and hydrate the eye area. It claims the key ingredients are triple peptides, bergamot oil, and citric acid. I included a full ingredient list at the end of my review (marked with 🟣). I included some info on some of the ingredients before that (marked with 🟢).

This comes in a nice pump bottle. The pump does squirt out too much if you’re not careful. I find if I carefully press it so I’m not pushing it down all the way, I get enough product and don’t waste any. It’s a thin gel consistency. It glides on nicely. It absorbs quickly leaving my under eyes feeling really hydrated and smooth. I have pretty dry under eyes. If I apply concealer, I have to make sure to moisturize them really well so they don’t look dry and cakey. A lot of the moisturizers that hydrate my under eyes enough are thicker and end up being too heavy to use concealer over. This is PERFECT! It’s thin and lightweight, but feels extremely hydrating! It gives my under eyes enough hydration and plumps them up. It doesn’t leave a sticky residue at all. Concealer goes over it beautifully and looks nice and smooth.

I haven’t been using it long enough to say anything about how it works long term on dark circles, firming, etc. But, I can say it’s really hydrating and plumping if you’re looking for something extremely hydrating under the eyes. I’m hopeful for other benefits long term given the ingredients, but even if I don’t get any more benefits, I’m still loving how well it hydrates my under eyes while being so lightweight! Just keep in mind it does have some essential oils and fragrant ingredients in it, so if you have sensitive skin, you might want to avoid this or at least check the ingredient list to see if they’re things that you’re sensitive to.

🟢Info on ingredients
Saccharide Isomerate, which is a 100% natural and plant-derived moisturizer. It binds to the skin stronger and longer than other moisturizer ingredients do so it can keep skin hydrated longer than usual.

Palmitoyl Tripeptide-1 & Palmitoyl Tetrrapeptide-7 - These are peptides combined to create a compound called Matrixyl 3000. Matrixyl is a highly-effective peptide composition that has been shown to stimulate the production of collagen and elastin, fill in fine lines & wrinkles while restoring elasticity.

Sodium Hyaluronate, which is a form of hyaluronic acid (HA). Helps skin hold onto water, making skin more plump and elastic.

Acetyl Hexapeptide-8 (aka Argireline), which is called “natures Botox.” It is a synthetic peptide that has several different potential wrinkle-fighting and anti-aging effects. It's so effective, that experts say it's the closest thing to Botox you can get. It prevents the muscle movement that leads to wrinkle formation. Argireline also promotes collagen production and optimizes the function of collagen, which both fight fine lines and improve moisture levels in the skin. It’s good for anyone looking to smooth wrinkles caused by repeated muscle movement in areas such as the forehead and around the eyes.

Chamomilla Recutita (Matricaria) Flower Extract, which has great anti-inflammatory properties and antioxidant properties.

ESSENTIAL OILS, PERFUMING INGREDIENTS
It has some essential oils and perfuming ingredients in it - Bergamot Fruit Oil, Orange Oil, Linalyl Acetate, Geranyl Acetate, and Linalool. These are super common and cheap fragrance ingredients. They oxidize on air exposure and the result can be quite irritating to the skin and can lead to allergic contact dermatitis and they count as frequent skin sensitizers. It is best to avoid them if you have sensitive skin.

🟣FULL INGREDIENT LIST
Water, Glycerin, Butylene Glycol, Saccharide Isomerate, Palmitoyl Tripeptide-1, Palmitoyl Tetrapeptide-7, Sodium Hyaluronate, Acetyl Hexapeptide-8, Chamomilla Recutita (Matricaria) Flower Extract, Carrageenan, Citrus Aurantium Bergamia (Bergamot) Fruit Oil, Citrus Aurantium Dulcis Oil, Sclerotium Gum, Xanthan Gum, Carbomer, Polysorbate 20, Potassium Sorbate, Citric Acid, Sodium Citrate, Triethyl Citrate, Linalyl Acetate, Geranyl Acetate, Terpineol, Linalool, Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin.

AEMP3A7IKW37CMWFXNKXWW6HGJHA_1.product_description: Morovan Gel Polish Remover - Professional Gel Soak Off Remover, Easily & Quickly Gel Remover for Nails Safe Nail Gel Polish Remover Gel Manicure Remover
AEMP3A7IKW37CMWFXNKXWW6HGJHA_1.review_text:
This is ONLY meant for GEL polish NOT for acrylic powder, dip powder, Poly gel, or builder gel. Why? I don’t know. I’m guessing whatever chemicals in it breakdown the gel polish won’t breakdown the acrylic powder, dip powder, Poly gel, or builder gel in the same way.

This works great! I have tried other gel polish remover before and they just don’t feel right on the nail. It’s hard to describe, but it’s just a weird feeling I get in my nail bed when I’ve applied them. I’ve been trying out different ones hoping to find one that doesn’t feel like that and works really well…I finally found one!

This is easy to use.
-USE NAIL FILE TO REMOVE TOP COAT. This step is important. A lot of people think this step isn’t necessary with a gel polish remover like this. That it’ll remove the top coat too. It might, I haven’t tried it. But, I’m guessing it wouldn’t do it as quickly and easily. Just take a nail file and lightly buff off the top coat. It doesn’t take much.
-Apply a thin coat of the gel polish remover just like you would any nail polish
-Let it sit for 3-8 minutes. It will start to crack/bubble.
-Take a cuticle pusher and use it to push off the nail polish. It should push off easily. You can always add another coat of the remover if it’s not fully off.

I found for me with 2 coats of gel polish on, it usually took me about 10 minutes from start to finish. So much easier than acetone or even a drill! As long as you remove the top coat by filing it off before applying this remover and give it time to work and soften the polish, it’s easy to scrape off!

As a side note, even though this says it’s not meant for acrylic powder, dip powder, builder gel, or Poly gels, I tried it with dip powder. It worked well but did take longer for it to crack/bubble and I had to do 2 coats of the remover. It also worked much better when it was a solid color dip powder and not a dip powder with glitter in it.

AES3YWD3ONJOUDRWFIV2ZO44QDAQ.product_description: PENEBELLA Anti-Aging Face Cream with Hyaluronic Acid,Vitamin C+E, Green tea Extract, Facial Skin Care - Anti-Aging face and nесk moisturizer, PENEBELLA 히알루론산, 비타민 C+E, 녹차 추출물, 페이셜 스킨 케어 안티에이징 페이스 크림 - 안티에이징 페이스 및 바디 모이스처라이저, PENEBELLA Crema facial antienvejecimiento con ácido hialurónico, vitamina C+E, extracto de té verde, cuidado facial de la piel, antienvejecimiento y crema hidratante
AES3YWD3ONJOUDRWFIV2ZO44QDAQ.review_text:
This PENEBELLA Anti-Aging Face Cream is filled with emollient oils, and not much green tea, which is something I love in a skin care product. My skin is normal to oily, but also sensitive, and cannot handle all of the oils in this product. It sort of just sits on top of my skin.
I really wish the company would have listed the ingredients, instead of pointing out the great ingredients that are in minute amounts. Aside from glycerin, the other touted ingredients are almost halfway down, or lower, on the ingredients list, or are not so skin friendly. Green tea is wonderful for your skin, but it is near the bottom of the ingredients list. Also, the type of vitamin C, Ascorbyl Palmitate, is not very skin friendly, and can actually be very irritating to sensitive skin, like mine.
This moisturizer may work well for those with very dry skin, but I would have liked to see the boasted about skin loving ingredients closer to the top of the ingredients list. Full transparency is always best, and will make customers happy. Listing some wonderful ingredients that are minimally effective in very small amounts, is a bit misleading. This moisturizer has way too many oils for my skin, is a bit irritating, and is not my favorite...

AES3YWD3ONJOUDRWFIV2ZO44QDAQ.product_description: Hair Removal Device
AES3YWD3ONJOUDRWFIV2ZO44QDAQ.review_text:
This Hair Removal Device by Ulike just as well as a couple of other IPL devices I have that cost much less. It comes packaged nicely, though I kept trying to open the flat two-sided green piece that covers the accessory side. It doesn't open.
The device does look quite fancy, and I was interested in skin rejuvenation, which is in one of the photos (that is mentioned in the other listing that shows this exact same device). The instruction booklet contains about as much as the empty listing page that I ordered it from. That page has no bullet points, only one photo.
They do have another listing for this same exact device, showing the accessories, extra photos with bits of information, and bullet points telling a little about it. I got my information from there.
The device does have the cooling feature, as many others do, which helps it not to zap too badly. It also comes with a razor and eye protection.
What it lacks, that many others include that are in or around this price range, is more attachments for the device. There needs to be at least one smaller light head for use around the lip area, as it's very hard to use the main one with the device being so large.
This IPL device works pretty much as well as any other, with none having the ability to make you completely hair-free at any point in the future. As far as the studies that I have seen, with diligent use, home IPL devices can only offer a little better than 50-60%-ish less hair.
My preferred device, which costs very little more than this one, has several attachments, including some specifically for skin rejuvenation. You do get a fancy box with this device, and it looks nice, but I don't think it provides any more or less than devices that cost much less.
I haven't found one yet that really only takes 10 minutes to do your legs, but if I ever do, that is the one that would probably take the cake! If you like fancy boxes and a sleek-looking device, I would recommend this one.

AES3YWD3ONJOUDRWFIV2ZO44QDAQ.product_description: LUXAZA 6 PCS Khaki Brown Neutral Eyeshadow Stick Set, Cream Eye Shadow Pencil Makeup, Shimmer And Matte Eye Pencil,Brightener Highlighter Eyeliner Crayon Make up
AES3YWD3ONJOUDRWFIV2ZO44QDAQ.review_text:
This LUXAZA 6 PCS Khaki Brown Neutral Eyeshadow Stick Set is so gorgeous! All of the colors are beautiful when applied alone, or used together. They are so easy to use and blend with the brush that is on the opposite end of each stick.
The colors are buildable, so you can have a whisper of color or make a bold statement. They also have great staying power, but can be washed away quickly with any cleanser.
My eyelids are naturally oily, so I have to add a wisp of translucent powder over top, so they won't stay tacky. They still keep the shimmer, too, which is not overdone. It is just right for my 51 year young self to wear and not look silly, just elegant.
I love this eyeshadow stick set! From the colors to the ease of use, it just works well. The colors would look beautiful on anyone's skin tone, and they are great for a busy schedule. It is easy to place them all into a pretty cosmetic jar or even a drawer for quick access.
They come nicely packaged and are more than worthy of gifting to any makeup lover. I would absolutely recommend these!

AES3YWD3ONJOUDRWFIV2ZO44QDAQ.product_description: Builder Gel Nail Kit -2 oz Clear&Pink Nail Extension Gel Big Capacity Builder Gel for Nails,Hard Gel Strengthen Set with Nail Forms Brush Nail File DIY for Nail Art Manicure
AES3YWD3ONJOUDRWFIV2ZO44QDAQ.review_text:
The Builder Nail Gels Kit in Clear & Pink is medium to semi thin ~ especially if it is used in warm temperatures. It is nothing like polygel, though it includes a slip solution. The clear is really clear and the pink is nice, also, though I don't use colors a lot. This applies so easily for me, cures as expected, and looks great. I am even able to build an apex.
The brush and other accessories are sub-par, like what most inexpensive sets have. They will do well for a newbie, until they figure out if they like the process. Then, they can replace them with better quality items.
The slip solution is confusing to be in a builder gel kit, though I find it great for wiping the sticky layer off the nails after application. It can also be used to clean the brush handle, and any other sticky places.
I am more than happy with the quality, viscosity, and end results I achieve with this builder gel. You also get a large amount of product to work with. It will last me a while. I love working with it, and would definitely recommend it!

AES3YWD3ONJOUDRWFIV2ZO44QDAQ.product_description: Hyaluronic Acid Serum 2 oz. Hydro-Plumping, Paraben and Alcohol-Free Daily Skincare, 7-in-1 Actique™ Hyal Matrix Complex with Natural Moisturizers, Rejuvenating Day and Night Serum for Dry, Dehydrated Skin
AES3YWD3ONJOUDRWFIV2ZO44QDAQ.review_text:
This Hydro-Plumping Hyaluronic Acid Serum is a simple, yet a powerhouse serum. It has wonderful moisturizing, anti-aging, antioxidant, and calming ingredients that are top notch. There are several types of super moisturizing Hyaluronic Acid. It also has Green Tea, which is proven to be an excellent antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial superstar.
This is a wonderful serum to use during your day or night routine. I like to apply it to damp, or well hydrated skin. Usually after applying a few layers of my toner. It applies and absorbs easily, and a little does go a long way. Any slight tackiness is taken care of after applying a good moisturizer to help lock in all the good stuff. It has a very light, hardly noticeable scent.
It really hydrates my skin and plumps my fine lines and wrinkles. My skin looks and feels better when using it. I have combination skin, but use Retin-A, which can be a bit drying and sometimes irritating. This serum really calms the irritation, yet enhances the anti-aging effects of the Retin-A.
This serum is a great every day serum. Especially for those who have sensitive and/or dry skin, but is beneficial for any skin type. It has great ingredients, and is not loaded with harsh chemicals, and provides so much good stuff for your skin. It is a simple, yet powerful serum. Highly recommended.

The stars of this serum are:

AES3YWD3ONJOUDRWFIV2ZO44QDAQ.product_description: Boiess Colognes Poppy mint For Moms, Babies & Kids | Natural Eau de Cologne | Clean & Fresh Scent | Children Fragrance For Soft & Sensitive Skin | Easy Use, Gentle on Baby | Size: 8.5 FL Oz
AES3YWD3ONJOUDRWFIV2ZO44QDAQ.review_text:
I really loved the idea of this Boiess Baby Cologne "Les Enfants" in White Blossom. Not because I think it is a good idea for a baby, because boy, is it not. I actually thought it would be perfect for myself since I don't like loud fragrances. The description of the scent profile really enticed me, as I love all of the notes. I was able to try both the Lavanda and the White Blossom scents.
Both of the "Cologne" sprays smell identical to me. I can't say that I can tell them apart at all. They both have a very strong earthy, herbal, slightly floral scent that is heavily ladened with alcohol upon spraying. It stays very strong for several minutes, but then starts to dry down.
Sadly, once it dries down, the scent pretty much dissipates. If I don't spray it heavily at first, which is too much for my asthma to handle, much less any baby, the scent just goes away completely. I must spray it on me again. If I spray it on a few times over an hour or so, I can smell the ever so slightest hint of it on my clothing later, if I put my nose right on it. That is a lot of spraying for very little payoff.
I know this is meant for kids mostly, but I would think the scent would and should last longer. Sure, my grandsons will like using it, maybe or not, as it is quite strong at first. But, I think it would just be more for the fun of it and very short lived. This is also very expensive "Cologne" to not be able to smell it after 30 minutes, and right at $28 is too expensive for me to buy just for the fun of it.  
For others this "Baby Cologne" may be something wonderful or maybe they can smell it more than I can. As I said, I really love the idea of a light fragrance, but not for babies. I do wish the scent stuck around more for me.

AES3YWD3ONJOUDRWFIV2ZO44QDAQ.product_description: KRISNICE Magnetic 3D Cat Eye Gel Nail Polish Lavender Purple Black Brown Manicure Color Changing Gel Soak Off UV LED Nail Art Varnish Set Starter Salon Kit 6 colors with 1 Magnet Stick(KHS6-002-01)
AES3YWD3ONJOUDRWFIV2ZO44QDAQ.review_text:
This is a great sampler set by KRISNICE. You get a black polish to use as a base or on its own, a couple of color changing polishes, a couple of cat eye polishes, and a sparkly red polish. They are all beautiful and the effects all work well. The cat eyes do require a few coats to get good coverage, and a bit of practice with the magnet to get a good design. The good thing about those are, you can always swipe through the design and start over till you get something you like, and then cure. I love the color changing ones the best, but they only show two toned on longer nails. Otherwise, they just change from one color to another, which is still pretty.
The huge thing about this company's sets that I don't like, is they are not labeled. Yes, you get stickers to swatch, but they don't stick! You end up having to glue them on or make other swatches. I really wish they would label or swatch the bottles. I'm starting to not get polish from brands that don't label. It's just such a hassle.
Overall, I love all the colors and effects. You can really come up with some unique nail designs with this set. I love the color change with one layer of the purple cat eye over top. This is a good mix and a lot of fun! I would recommend

AES3YWD3ONJOUDRWFIV2ZO44QDAQ.product_description: Straight Razor with 10 Blades, Single Blade Barber Straight Edge Razor for Men Women, Manual Hair Shaving kit Fits Single Edge Blade, For Barbers, Salons, Hair Enthusiasts (Green Wood)
AES3YWD3ONJOUDRWFIV2ZO44QDAQ.review_text:
The straight razor (shavette) I received is far from being professional quality nor could it be an heirloom that can be passed down in the family. It is made from cheap materials and has several defects.
The clasp is so thinly made, that it is easily bent just from disengaging it from the spine. There is a gouge on one spine that goes in on one side and out on the other. And, the razor blade does not stay seated properly once clasped. The wooden scales are not neatly finished. The blades that come with it are not the snap kind. They are full double sided blades, making them more dangerous to have to cut them without getting cut. They are also very thin and cheap. There's no way I can shave a neck, sideburns, facial hair, etc., with this defective razor.
I could have overlooked cosmetic issues regarding a razor of this price point. It is the physical defects that hindered its use that are major problems for me.
I contacted the seller, but was told that I could keep the defective product, and "we recommend another straight for you, better than that one in your hand", and I was given the asin number, so I could purchase it. This was not only poor Customer Service, but a lack of confidence in this, their own product. If they don't recommend this razor, I certainly don't either. It really could have gone much better.

AES3YWD3ONJOUDRWFIV2ZO44QDAQ.product_description: Poly Nails Gel Kit - Glitter Poly Nails Gel 6 Colors Builder Gel Nude Nature Series Nail Extension Gel Nail Enhancement Manicure Kit for Gel Polish Starter and Professional Nail Technician
AES3YWD3ONJOUDRWFIV2ZO44QDAQ.review_text:
This Belle polygel kit is a great starter set from beginner to expert levels. It has some beautiful neutral colors, along with a white, and gorgeous glitters. They are all half ounce size tubes that will create a few sets of nails each, or you can mix and match the colors to make them go farther.
This kit includes; Six .5 oz. polygel colors, primer, gel base and top coats, a nail strengthener, cuticle oil, slip solution, dual forms, polygel brush with spatula, nail clips, and alcohol wipes. It comes nicely packaged in a lovely black box with cutouts to hold everything in place.
At minimum, you will need to supply your nail prep and finishing tools and liquids, such as: cuticle pusher and possibly nippers, a buffer, and nail dehydrator/alcohol, but these are things you will want to keep in good supply, anyways.
This polygel is so easy to work with. It is not too hard nor too soft. It's very easily workable with the provided slip solution. Even a beginner will have no trouble using it. Just remember, that if your surrounding temperature gets too cold or too hot, it affects the viscosity of the polygel, so work in a room that feels nice.
I did two nail swatches; one solid glitter and the other a French manicure with a shimmery twist. As I said, the polygel applied so easily, it also cured as expected without any problems, and the end results turned out beautiful.
I have to say that when I received my Belle polygel kit, there was a small issue with my order. I contacted their customer service and was met with such kindness and prompt service. They answered all my questions very quickly and respectfully. They're promptness in solving my problem, and their patience in dealing with my questions, shows me that they really care about their customers. Knowing that they were not privy to my customer status lets me know that they will treat all customers the same.
The colors are all so beautiful, and the glitters really make a statement. This set would make a great addition to anyone's collection and would also make a wonderful gift. Knowing this polygel kit is also backed by Belle, a wonderful company who really values their customers, makes a great product even better. I would most definitely recommend it!

AES3YWD3ONJOUDRWFIV2ZO44QDAQ.product_description: CELIMAX The Real Sedum Aqua Boosting Essence - with 65.33% Sedum Extract, Hyaluronic Acid Complex, 150ml
AES3YWD3ONJOUDRWFIV2ZO44QDAQ.review_text: I love how this Essence has such soothing and hydrating ingredients. I'm just learning about a lot of the ingredients that are in most Korean beauty products, and I'm also Learning that some of them do not do well with my skin. This one works wonderfully for me. I use Retin-A, so anything really harsh or very exfoliating is too much. The first one made my skin very red, swollen, and angry looking. This one feels very nice on my skin and I love the way my skin is looking and feeling now. I would definitely recommend it! Especially, for those using Retin-A or those with very sensitive skin.

AES3YWD3ONJOUDRWFIV2ZO44QDAQ.product_description: washable roll colored pink cloth toilet signature microfiber recycled shop pack travel select bulk paperless tissue heavy duty flannel fabric yard
AES3YWD3ONJOUDRWFIV2ZO44QDAQ.review_text:
I will definitely not get a 4 month's use out of these KitchLife Reusable Bamboo Paper Towels. My intended use was to use them as "hand towels" in the bathroom, but they are not soft or very absorbent. You really have to wet them to get use from them.
The roll and towels are smaller than "paper" towels, and they have a weird texture. They are not scrubby, but work fine for cleaning up the bathroom sink and counter in between deep cleanings. You can also wash and reuse them. Though I would hand wash them instead of machine wash. And, I would spray them with Hypochlorous Acid, or another people/animal friendly disinfectant.
I don't particularly want a bunch of these just hanging around in a container, or hanging to dry, as I don't really like cleaning with them. They are just meh to me. I'd rather use microfiber cloths.

AES3YWD3ONJOUDRWFIV2ZO44QDAQ.product_description: XUYU Infrared Heating Pad Natural Jade Tourmaline for Back Neck Shoulder (28” x 17.3”) Smart Controller with Memory Function, Auto Shut Off and Travel Bag Included
AES3YWD3ONJOUDRWFIV2ZO44QDAQ.review_text:
This XUYU Infrared Heating Pad Natural Jade Tourmaline for Back Neck Shoulder gets nice and toasty, but is stiff, and smells like burning wires or chemicals. I love the size, as it covers my entire back, though I am quite short. This is the first time I've tried a heating pad that has Jade tourmaline, but it seems to give it a more even, and hot heat.  
It does take a little while longer for it to heat up than a regular heating pad, but there's no way I could use it turned on the highest setting, as it gets so very hot. The heating pad material is quite stiff and just does not feel very nice against my skin. It would be quite hard to wrap around your shoulder or any other part of your body, as it is not very flexible. I even find it a bit uncomfortable leaning back on it, when sitting on my sofa.
When turned on, it smells quite strongly of wires or chemicals burning. I thought that it would go away after a bit of use, but it is still the same. I know some people go to sleep with a heating pad on, but I would not feel safe leaving this one on without it being looked after. The smell bothered me so bad, I actually stopped using it, for fear that there is a short in it somewhere.
Though I really love the heat produced by this natural Jade tourmaline heating pad, the burning smell makes me afraid to use it. It is nice and large, but the stiffness of the material is a bit uncomfortable, as well. Maybe it is supposed to be that way, due to the Jade tourmaline, but neither the smell nor the feel is very comforting to me. Hopefully others will not have this experience, but it's just not my favorite.

AES3YWD3ONJOUDRWFIV2ZO44QDAQ.product_description: Sandalwood Essential Oil 100ML,100% Pure Organic Sandalwood Essential Oils for Aromatherapy, Diffuser, Massage, Skin Care, Bath
AES3YWD3ONJOUDRWFIV2ZO44QDAQ.review_text:
This is a pretty nice Vanilla fragrance oil. It is a fragrance oil or blend, not an essential oil. There's no such thing as vanilla essential oil. In the world of vanilla, there are vanilla absolutes, vanilla extract, vanilla flavoring, and vanilla fragrance oils or blends. The price is also an indicator that this is not a vanilla absolute, which costs many times the cost of this bottle.
This Vanilla fragrance oil smells like a Vanilla with a sugary hint. It is a rather nice smelling fragrance oil and works pretty much like essential oil, as far as diffusing, DIY air fresheners, wax melts, and candles. I would not use this to make any kind of lip balms or anything to actually go on the skin, like lotions, since this is made with chemicals.
Otherwise, it smells very nice and I would recommend it as a great fragrance oil.

AES3YWD3ONJOUDRWFIV2ZO44QDAQ.product_description: Dr. Mercola Organic White Grapefruit Essential Oil - 1 oz.

Though it smells good on its own, there are many blends using grapefruit that smell so good, and I look forward to trying lots of them.
It does seem to have a lighter scent than I'm used to, so I would not trust using it in any skin or lip recipes. For diffusing and candle making, I would definitely recommend it.

AES3YWD3ONJOUDRWFIV2ZO44QDAQ.product_description: OvaCue Wireless Fertility Monitor for Women with Bluetooth Ovulation Tracking - Ovulation Predictor Kit, Hormone Test Kit for Women, Digital Easy Home Fertility Tracker Track* - by Fairhaven Health

AES3YWD3ONJOUDRWFIV2ZO44QDAQ.product_description: Gentle and thorough cleaning. Ultrasonic source induces high-frequency vibrations in water. Removes small particles of dirt even in inaccessible areas.
AES3YWD3ONJOUDRWFIV2ZO44QDAQ.review_text: This Beurer Professional Ultrasonic Cleanser with Digital Timer works well for cleaning the pail of vintage costume and real jewelry I have that really needs it. It's pretty easy to figure out without even looking at the directions, but you may need to for precautions and water requirements, if using dish soap. I used a jewelry cleaning liquid meant for Ultrasonic Cleaners, and cleaned several pieces at a time. I have a few large pieces that will need to be done in sections, but for most regular jewelry the size is sufficient. It did a good job cleaning the pieces I experimented with. It has a timer that goes by 30 second intervals, with the highest time limit at 7:30. I'm not sure why that particular number is the magic one for this device, but some tools and other items that are particularly dirty, may need more time. Overall, it is a nice working cleaner for household jewelry and semi-small items, and I would definitely recommend it.

AES3YWD3ONJOUDRWFIV2ZO44QDAQ.product_description: 1875 Watt Negative Ionic Hair Dryer, ENISECA Precise Wind Heat/Speed Setting Tech Professional Salon Blow Dryer Fast Drying Low Noise with Powerful AC Motor and Diffuser Comb for Women Men, Grey
AES3YWD3ONJOUDRWFIV2ZO44QDAQ.review_text:

It didn't even make it halfway through before it crapped out. Dead. The plug didn't shut it off. It just died. With all of its shortcomings and now this, it's a definite no go...

2/3/22: This ENISECA 1875 Watt Negative Ionic Hair Dryer is not as versatile as it is made out to be. I was really looking forward to being able to change the temperature and wind settings to my liking. I have fine thin hair, and need a lower speed with hotter temperatures than most blow dryers have. With this blow dryer, it's impossible.
The only time you can adjust the temperature is if it's on the highest wind speed, which is totally ridiculous. If you lower the wind speed at all, it goes to the coldest temperature, which is even more ridiculous. I do appreciate being able to change the temperature on the highest wind setting, but I need a lower wind setting and a higher temperature setting than cold. And, I do mean cold.
After deciphering the meaning behind this seemingly faulty setting, they make it appear that a lower wind speed should only have low temperatures for children's sake. I didn't buy this blow dryer for a child, I bought it for myself. Furthermore, I would not want to blow dry my child's hair with cold air.
This blow dryer could have been a super win all around, but instead it's a flop for me. It's fine if you only blow dry your hair on a medium/high speed at all times, but for those of us who don't or can't do that, it's pretty much useless. Just to note, the highest wind speed setting is not nearly high enough to please those with thick long hair, but it get extremely hot. This is not my favorite.

AES3YWD3ONJOUDRWFIV2ZO44QDAQ.product_description: Non Binding Socks Women,JSPA 6 Pack Diabetic and Circulatory Ankle Socks Moisture Wicking Cushioned Dress Crew Cotton Edema Socks with Non Binding Loose Top Seamless Toe Grey Medium

AES3YWD3ONJOUDRWFIV2ZO44QDAQ.product_description: Lavender Essential Oil, MAYJAM Premium Pure Essential Oils, 3.38FL.OZ Lavender Oil for Diffusers Soap Candle Making, Ideal for Home Office Car Yoga Use

AES3YWD3ONJOUDRWFIV2ZO44QDAQ.product_description: Colageno Hidrolizado En Polvo Peptides - Sin Sabor - para Mujer Y Hombre El Cabello, Uñas, Piel, Huesos Y Cara Proteina Grass Fed 100% Puro - Vitamina Natural Tipo 1 Y 3 Frasco De 1lb

AES3YWD3ONJOUDRWFIV2ZO44QDAQ.product_description: Electronic Body Masager, Digital Therapy Machine Pain Relief Face Lift Body Beauty Machine for Lose Weight and Relieve Body Aches
AES3YWD3ONJOUDRWFIV2ZO44QDAQ.review_text:
This can be a very dangerous and TENS unit. It is not a slimming instrument. It is very much like the devices used in doctors and physical therapy offices. It comes with a less than adequate "manual", with over-the-top claims of making you slim and trim, increasing your bust size, among many other crazy things.
This should come with much better instructions, warnings, and contraindications. There are so many ways that you can use a TENS unit in the wrong way that is very dangerous and life-threatening. There is no mention of warnings or contraindications, whatsoever, in the hyped up "manual".
What my sensitive nerves experienced were unpleasant muscle contractions, along with zaps and zings to the point that I could not stand it. I can use a regular TENS unit on lower settings, but the "Instrument" I received is a bit unstable, and every electrode does not put out the same strength/intensity on the chosen stimulation mode. I used ultrasound gel and made sure the electrodes were well covered, but it didn't seem to make a difference. I still got zapped by one electrode or another. Maybe this machine is just too strong for my nerves. They are rather sensitive.
This might work as a very good TENS unit for some people, but I don't believe one word about it toning your body, making you lose weight, enhancing your breast or any other part of your body. Those are just outright lies. That is why they put hyphens in between such words in the listing.
Many people would love such a device for the relief of pain without being told it will help them lose weight, develop strong and beautiful breasts, and even prevent cancer, when it clearly will not. People who are in pain are desperate to relieve it without the use of medications. They would gladly buy a professional TENS unit, but who wants to buy a gimmick?
Sadly, this will not work for me, even as a TENS unit. I just wish that it were sold solely as such.

AES3YWD3ONJOUDRWFIV2ZO44QDAQ.product_description: IVL Cran-D Relief – D-Mannose and Cranberry Supplement for Urinary Tract Health, UTI Support, Antioxidant and Immune Support
AES3YWD3ONJOUDRWFIV2ZO44QDAQ.review_text:
I had not heard of D-Mannose and Cranberry Supplement until a few months ago when I was desperately seeking relief from UTIs every few months. I'd been taking apple cider vinegar, cream of tartar, and baking soda, which works well, but takes too long.
After the first sign of another UTI, I took three of these for 5 days, and I stopped having any symptoms from day one. It never did turn into a full-blown UTI. I've been taking one a day ever since.
I'm so thankful to have found this, as UTIs are so painful and irritating. It's nice to have something that will help keep them away. Though this is a bit expensive, it works very well. I might look for a coupon or shop around when I run out, but I would absolutely recommend taking D-Mannose and Cranberry Supplements.

AES3YWD3ONJOUDRWFIV2ZO44QDAQ.product_description: Sandalwood Essential Oil, MAYJAM Premium Pure Essential Oils, 3.38FL.OZ Sandalwood Oil for Diffusers Soap Candle Making, Ideal for Home Office Car Yoga Use
AES3YWD3ONJOUDRWFIV2ZO44QDAQ.review_text:
I've used and studied essential oils for many years. I make and sell soap and bath and body products using them. I also diffuse them daily. I've used real sandalwood and it's dupe, Amyris essential oil, which is known as West Indian Sandalwood.
Real Sandalwood essential oil is extremely expensive. Most inexpensive Sandalwood that is sold on the market is actually Amyris (Balsamifera) Essential Oil, better known as West Indian Sandalwood, which smells very similar, but costs much less.
This Sandalwood does not smell like Sandalwood, nor does it smell like Amyris. It reminds me more of a middle eastern fragrance oil that is light in nature, and very perfume-like. There are no sweet notes of benzoin or vanilla that dry down to blend with the soft, warm notes that are woodsy and a bit smokey. In fact, this oil is not reminiscent of Sandalwood at all, to my nose. It has more of a feminine perfume like scent.
I would definitely search for true Sandalwood, which is extremely expensive, or the much more affordable, Amyris Essential Oil. You will get a very warm pleasant smelling oil, instead of one that is very perfumy. I would not recommend this.

AES3YWD3ONJOUDRWFIV2ZO44QDAQ.product_description: Professional Facial Steamer: Face Steamer for Facial Deep Cleaning with Aromatherapy Kit and Blackhead Removal Tools, Vaporizador Facial Steamer for face. (Pink)
AES3YWD3ONJOUDRWFIV2ZO44QDAQ.review_text:
This facial steamer comes in pieces in a plain cardboard box. There are instructions on how to put it together and how to use it, but it's pretty self-explanatory. Once together, you fill the steamer cup to the max line with hot tap water, add essential oils to a cotton swab and stick it in the aromatherapy bud holder next to the nozzle, if desired, and turn the heat and light on. Within just a few moments, there's a steady stream of steam coming out of the nozzle. It goes a fair distance, but to get the best coverage of your face with the steam, you will want to be about 15 inches below the nozzle.
The steam feels really wonderful and relaxing! It runs for about 4 to 5 minutes and really opens your pores to help clean away any impurities.
I really like the simplicity of this facial steamer, but would not consider it professional quality. The mechanical portion and cup are made of very lightweight plastic, do not seem extremely durable, and it is very basic in its function. I have been a cosmetologist for over 30 years, and this is more suited for home use.
Using this facial steamer is a great way to take care of your skin and a wonderful way to spend time doing some self-care. There's nothing like spending some time a day or two each week and really taking good care of your skin. This facial steamer will help you do that in the comfort of your own home, and save you money at the same time. I'm really enjoying it and would definitely recommend it!

AES3YWD3ONJOUDRWFIV2ZO44QDAQ.product_description: Center Pull Spunlace Dry Wipes, 6 Rolls, Multi-Use Hand Towels, Refill For Bucket Wipes To Create Own Cleaning Wipes, Ships Dry Or Use In Center Pull Dispenser Hand Towels

The strands are both thin and short, so I made my cornrows smaller in the front and combined several in the back.  I spaced the hair in the back 2.5 finger widths apart and spaced the hair in the top about 1 finger width apart.  I ended up leaving some space at the very back/bottom empty and just let the hair that was hanging cover that part.  I wish this hair would've come with at least 8 packs for a fuller head.

AFYSHCJX77N6OZHBKFSTSYZGNJWQ.product_description: Long Black Wavy Wig with Bangs for Women Synthetic Wigs Natural Looking Realistic Wigs Hair for Daily Party Cosplay Use
AFYSHCJX77N6OZHBKFSTSYZGNJWQ.review_text: This unit has no combs.  This unit makes me nervous because there aren't many ways to secure this unit to make sure it doesn't slide off.  The hair is very pretty, but does not look realistic.  This looks very plastic, and I doubt that this will last long.  I do appreciate all of the free extras included in the box. AFYSHCJX77N6OZHBKFSTSYZGNJWQ.product_description: 6 Pack Portable travel bottles-30ml Flip Cap Reusable Bottles Keychain Carriers for Shampoo,Hand Sanitizer Refillable Keychain Sanitizer Holder -1oz dispenser bottle, Metal 6 Pack Buckle Include
AFYSHCJX77N6OZHBKFSTSYZGNJWQ.review_text: These bottles are very easy to use. I wish the bottles were a bit larger so I wouldn't have to refill so often, but overall I have no complaints.  I highly recommend.

AFYSHCJX77N6OZHBKFSTSYZGNJWQ.product_description: Senegalese Twist Crochet Braids Wavy Twist Crochet Hair 14 Inch 5 Packs Wavy Ends free Synthetic Hair Extension Curly Crochet Twist Hair (1B#)
AFYSHCJX77N6OZHBKFSTSYZGNJWQ.review_text: I have mixed feelings about this hair.  The twists are beautiful!  This is made from a coarser hair texture so it isn't as soft as I expected Senegalese twists to be.  These are twisted tightly, so based off of the twists alone, I think you could be able to get away with using this hair more than once.  The con of this hair is that the ends come tangled.  I finger detangled this hair for 5 minutes, and yes it did get easier to run my fingers through, I never achieved a complete detangle of the hair.  I think this hair will be difficult to reuse solely off of this aspect of the style.  I think the ends of this hair may have to be combed out daily...maybe even more than one time a day, daily.  This style is very cute I'm just not sure how long it will last since the ends are tangled straight out of the package.  I still believe this hair is gorgeous and worth buying.

AFYSHCJX77N6OZHBKFSTSYZGNJWQ.product_description: Bomb Twist Crochet Hair 12 Inch Pre-Looped Senegalese Spring Twist Crochet Braids Hair Curly End Synthetic Hair Extension 24Roots Short Ombre Passion Twist Braiding Hair (#1B)
AFYSHCJX77N6OZHBKFSTSYZGNJWQ.review_text: This hair is gorgeous! I love this hair.  It's beautiful.  These twists are very small so your hair pattern would have to match accordingly.  I think if you have smaller cornrows in the front and combine a 2-3 cornrows into one large cornrow in the back of the hair, this will be enough hair for one hair style.  Spacing is everything when it comes to prepackaged hairstyles.  Overall I have no complaints about this hair, and I highly recommend.

AFYSHCJX77N6OZHBKFSTSYZGNJWQ.product_description: 6 Packs Short Spring Twist Crochet Hair Ombre Bomb Bob Curly Spring Pre-twisted Braids Synthetic Fluffy Hair Extensions (6, T27)
AFYSHCJX77N6OZHBKFSTSYZGNJWQ.review_text: This hair is beautiful.  The ends are frizzy straight out of the pack, but after installed the hair is beautiful!  The only off putting thing about this hair is that this hair is rough.  I would recommend washing this hair and maybe soaking this hair in fabric softener for about 15, because it is made up of synthetic fibers in order to soften up this hair a bit.  Other than that, I highly recommend this hair. Make sure you space this hair out, so that the 6 packs will complete your entire hairstyle.

AFYSHCJX77N6OZHBKFSTSYZGNJWQ.product_description: ZWIFEJIANQ Silicone Back Scrubber,Exfoliating Lengthen Silicone Bath Body Brush for Men and Women,Deep Clean & Invigorate Your Skin(30 inch, Green)
AFYSHCJX77N6OZHBKFSTSYZGNJWQ.review_text: I ordered this for my sister, and this is what she had to say:  She wanted it because she thought it would be exfoliating. After using this body brush she said she still felt like she needed to follow up with a wash cloth to ensure that her body was cleansed to her liking.

AFUBMCVI5J6G4F2RFQGTDRXLE6VQ.review_text: So it's honestly not bad at this price point. It sheds a bit but all units have some shedding. For the mix brown I give 4 stars.The face front is about 2 inches and is meant to be cut and plucked for a natural look. I did neither in the photo. I just folded it under the the front as I'm afraid that cutting will make it look lifted in the front and obviously show it's a wig without some glue to put it down. The color is not exactly what I wanted. I was hoping it would be a darker brown. It's kinda a mousey brown and alittle strange in my opinion. It will need to be restyle in the front as some waves/curls flattened out by how it was packed in transport. The part is both a plastic fake skin and a mesh on top. You can see the mesh upon close examination. Makeup might help to conceal this.... Or make it worse. What I did like was the fullness and length. The weft was not too easy to be seen even when pulling hair apart. This is good compared to other brands where the wefts are often very visible, especially in the back and crown of a unit. Because the simulated scalp is narrow, you won't be able to change the part. It's also a bit flat near the part so it's gonna take some work to give a bit of volume. I would have enjoyed this much more had the color been a rich brown and if the scalp was a bit more realistic. Would I wear in public? Probably not. Would this be good for photo shoots or costumes ? yes. Would I buy other colors from this brand? Yes and I haven't done that with other brands on Amazon. For the purple ombre: I give 3 stars. It doesn't have the lace in front. This is more pure costume. The black is very shiney and the front of wig where the part is shows a bit of the black backing for construction. If it laid more flat and had the lace I would have given the purple ombre 4 stars. Dull the shiney with some powder like dry shampoo or maybe even dark eyeshadow. The fake scalp is actually better on the purple ombre compared to the brown mix. The ombre for the blonde is also a 4 star. Hair at the crown is a bit flat but the rest of the style is beautiful. The brown to blonde has the 2 inch lace like the long brown one. It's not as full on the head but you don't see the wefts unless you pull it apart a bit.  I feel the color is much more realistic. Hair feels pretty good for a synthetic. Note if you play too much , it will get a knotty feel. Again, good for photos. Some people might actually wear it daily but I don't know if it took take daily abuse. Length is great.

AFUBMCVI5J6G4F2RFQGTDRXLE6VQ.product_description: BOGSEA Dark Brown Wig with Bangs Long Dark Brown Wigs for Women Long Synthetic Wavy Wigs for Daily Party (24Inch,Dark Brown)
AFUBMCVI5J6G4F2RFQGTDRXLE6VQ.review_text: So I felt they did a good job of hiding the weft and had alot of hair. The unit shed pretty bad just by touching it though. The hair was shiney but powder should control that. The length was there. It had one spot near the bangs that looked like someone fried it. And that would be hard to conceal. The bangs looked nicer then most but it just wasn't for me. Fake scalp also not best I've seen but concealer would probably fix that. The top had no volume and I don't mean amount of hair. It was slicked down really tight. I tried to shake it a bit with my fingers to see if it would gain some life but it didn't, plus a bunch of hair fell out.  This super flat look near the fake scalp and with a mid part that cannot be moved is just gonna make me look like the Amish. I would look at this company again if they had a unit without the bangs and maybe a more flexible part. A mini front lace would probably help.

AFUBMCVI5J6G4F2RFQGTDRXLE6VQ.review_text: So they came packed nicely but not in the s-noilite package. No logo. Just staples to a cardboard slip and wrapped in a pink bag. The hair feels nice. AFUBMCVI5J6G4F2RFQGTDRXLE6VQ.product_description: Magnetic Eyelashes False Lashes with Magnets Top and Bottom Magnetic Lashes Resuable Lashes 2 Pair / 8pcs Natural Style
AFUBMCVI5J6G4F2RFQGTDRXLE6VQ.review_text: The magnet is strong. I bought the two paid sandwich style. I tried the videos, and the hacks that say cut them ...I tried applying with special lash tweezers... Nothing works to get them close to the lash lid. The magnetic is strong so I'm sure it won't fall off, but it's so strong that when you start to move the under lash toward your eye with the upper lash laying on top of your lashes, the magnetic pulls and moves is soil quickly that it always ends up locked half way through your natural lashes. And I'm a contact wearer...so it's not like I have  fear of putting stuff near my eyes. These probably will work well with lash liners. The lashes themselves look nicely constructed.
